meta.scope: These Terms apply to all services, systems, features, APIs, pages, authentication flows, support channels, integrations, and any related functionality, including but not limited to current and future implementations, whether accessed directly or indirectly.
meta.userResponsibility: You are solely and fully responsible for your account, credentials, linked services, devices, sessions, and all actions performed directly or indirectly under your account, whether authorized or unauthorized.
meta.staffDiscretion: All decisions, actions, approvals, denials, restrictions, or enforcement measures are made at the sole discretion of staff and may be applied at any time, with or without notice.

hero.title: Terms of Service
hero.description: By accessing, creating an account, or using any part of the service, you agree to be legally bound by these Terms of Service. These Terms govern all interactions, features, systems, and support channels associated with the service, including any future updates or additions.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
content: By accessing or using the service in any way, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to be bound by these Terms in their entirety.
If you do not agree with any part of these Terms, you must immediately discontinue use of the service.
Continued use of the service following any updates constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms, regardless of whether you have reviewed them.

sections.title: Account Ownership and Responsibility
content: All accounts are considered the responsibility of the user who created or accessed them, regardless of how access was obtained.
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials, including but not limited to passwords, tokens, sessions, and linked authentication methods.
Any action performed through your account shall be considered your responsibility, whether performed by you or by any third party, intentionally or unintentionally.

sections.title: Authentication, Credentials, and Recovery
content: You acknowledge that there is no guaranteed account recovery system.
Recovery requests may require verification through linked services, including but not limited to Discord or email, and are subject to staff approval at their sole discretion.
Failure to maintain access to your credentials or linked accounts may result in permanent loss of access without liability.

sections.title: Usernames and Identity
content: You agree not to use usernames that are misleading, offensive, impersonating, or otherwise disruptive.
We reserve the right to change, restrict, or remove usernames at any time without notice.
Identity-related data such as usernames, IDs, and linked accounts may be displayed, stored, or processed as part of the service.

sections.title: Email and Two-Factor Authentication
content: You are responsible for maintaining access to any email used for verification or security purposes.
We are not responsible for delivery failures, delays, or inability to access verification codes.
Loss of access to your email or authentication methods does not guarantee recovery or account restoration.

sections.title: Linked Accounts and Dependencies
content: Certain features may depend on linking external accounts, including but not limited to Discord or Roblox.
You are responsible for ensuring that linked accounts remain valid, accessible, and correctly connected.
Failure to maintain linked accounts may result in loss of functionality, rewards, or support eligibility.

sections.title: Data Visibility and Public Information
content: You acknowledge that certain account data may be visible to other users or staff, including but not limited to IDs, statistics, and profile information.
We reserve the right to display, process, or share such information as necessary for service functionality, moderation, or support.

sections.title: Data Accuracy and Delays
content: Displayed data may be delayed, cached, or temporarily inconsistent with backend records.
You agree that visual discrepancies do not constitute errors or entitlement to compensation.
Backend records shall take precedence over any displayed values.

sections.title: Rewards, Quests, and Features
content: All rewards, quests, and features are provided on an as-available basis and are not guaranteed.
We may modify, suspend, limit, or remove any feature at any time without notice.
Completion of any task does not guarantee reward issuance unless explicitly approved and processed.

sections.title: Support and Communication
content: Support may be provided through multiple channels, including but not limited to Discord, website tickets, or email.
Staff may review, deny, ignore, escalate, or close any request at their discretion.
Submitting a request does not guarantee a response or outcome.

sections.title: Ticket Handling and Discretion
content: All tickets are subject to review and handling by staff, including reassignment, escalation, or closure.
Staff decisions are final unless explicitly overridden by higher authority.
We reserve the right to deny any request for any reason deemed necessary.

sections.title: No Responsibility for Leaks
content: We are not responsible for any leaks, screenshots, recordings, or exposure of communications.
This includes all support channels and any data shared within them.

sections.title: Logging and Monitoring
content: All actions may be logged, including but not limited to login attempts, interactions, and support activity.
Logs may be reviewed for moderation, security, or operational purposes at any time.

sections.title: IP Storage and Abuse Prevention
content: We may store IP addresses and related metadata for security and abuse prevention.
Abuse, including but not limited to spam, exploitation, or attacks, may result in immediate restrictions or bans.

sections.title: Security Responsibility
content: You are responsible for securing your account, devices, and sessions.
We are not responsible for unauthorized access resulting from your failure to maintain security.

sections.title: Exploits and Abuse
content: You may not exploit bugs, automate actions, bypass safeguards, or manipulate systems.
Any abuse may result in removal of rewards, restrictions, or permanent bans.

sections.title: Alternate Accounts
content: Use of alternate accounts to gain advantage or bypass restrictions is strictly prohibited.
Violations may result in all related accounts being restricted or banned.

sections.title: Prohibited Conduct
list: Attempting unauthorized access to systems or data
Bypassing or attempting to bypass safeguards

sections.title: Bans and Enforcement
content: Accounts may be restricted or banned for any violation or for any reason deemed necessary by staff.
Bans may be temporary or permanent.
Appeals are not guaranteed and may be denied without explanation.

sections.title: Service Availability
content: The service may be unavailable at any time due to maintenance, updates, or unforeseen issues.
We are not responsible for downtime, interruptions, or loss of access.

sections.title: Data Security Disclaimer
content: While we take reasonable steps to protect data, no system is completely secure.
We are not responsible for breaches, unauthorized access, or data loss beyond our control.

sections.title: Feature Modifications
content: We reserve the right to modify or remove any feature at any time without notice.
Changes may affect functionality, availability, or access.

sections.title: Right to Refuse Service
content: We may deny or restrict access to any user at any time for any reason.

sections.title: Independence
content: This service is not affiliated with or endorsed by Roblox or any third party unless explicitly stated.

sections.title: No Guarantees
content: We make no guarantees regarding rewards, outcomes, support, or availability.

sections.title: User Submissions
content: Any content you submit may be stored, reviewed, and used for moderation or operational purposes.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
content: We are not liable for any damages, losses, or issues arising from use of the service.
This includes direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.

sections.title: Enforcement Rights
content: Failure to enforce any provision does not waive our right to enforce it later.

sections.title: Changes to Terms
content: These Terms may be updated at any time without notice.
Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

sections.title: Final Agreement
content: By using the service, you confirm that you accept all Terms and agree to comply with all rules and decisions.
You acknowledge that staff have authority to enforce these Terms as necessary.

cards.title: Account Recovery
cards.content: Account recovery is not guaranteed and is subject to verification and staff discretion.

cards.title: Support Records
cards.content: Support interactions may be logged, stored, and reviewed for moderation and operational purposes.

extras.footer: These Terms apply to all current and future features. Continued use constitutes full acceptance of all provisions.
